title: Village Farms International (VFF) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Village Farms Q2 2024 total net sales grew to $92.1 million, representing 19% year-over-year growth. Net loss was $23.5 million ($0.21 per share) with $12 million attributable to a noncash impairment on US cannabis operations. Operating cash flow was positive CAD7.2 million. Cash position was $29.7 million with $44 million in total term debt. Canadian Cannabis generated CAD55.8 million in sales, a 45% YoY increase with gross margin of 26%, or 28% excluding low-margin products. Super Toast brand achieved a 94% repeat purchase rate. Fresh Produce sales were $47 million, a 7% YoY increase, but experienced temporary pricing pressures in Q2. Performance improved in July-August due to supply constraints. International Exports were $2.1 million, growing 11% with operations expanding in Germany and United Kingdom. SG&A Expense as a Percentage of Sales improved to 22%. Consolidated Adjusted EBITDA was negative $3.6 million. Working Capital was $6.1 million.
